summary_one_line: Font input whose resolved script tag falls in the USE-shaper case-block (HB_SCRIPT_PHAGS_PA and the Unicode-5.0+ additions) reaches the blocked case arm.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font whose parsed script property (planner->props.script) resolves to one of the Unicode-5.0+ scripts handled by the shared USE case block at line 300 (HB_SCRIPT_PHAGS_PA). This requires valid OpenType table magic (e.g. GSUB/GPOS) plus script/script-tag bytes that decode to a USE-routed script rather than DFLT/latn, so the categorize switch lands on the line-300 arm.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winning seeds carry structured table-ish byte runs (e.g. ascii 'darf', repeated 0x06/0x64/0x6e fields and embedded tags like 'h-hans', 'h-min') that drive the script property into the USE case block; the W-only overlay marks line 300 and the entire downstream USE block (lines 303-398) as hit, and the branch averages 34 hits for the winner.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocking seeds are dominated by literal magic-table tokens 'GSUB'/'GPOS' at offset 0x0c with long 0x20/0x5a/0x47 filler runs; they resolve to scripts handled by earlier arms (the L-only overlay hits the Indic/Telugu block at 231-244 and the Myanmar block at 249-262, never line 300), so the loser blocks on this branch in 9/10 trials with 0 hits.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The winner value_profile uses the CMP_MAP gradient: each script-tag / table-magic CMP writes a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket, and an input that is one bucket closer to a USE-routed script tag is preserved, letting the corpus incrementally walk the operand toward the line-300 USE block. The loser value_profile_cmplog additionally carries the input-to-state comparison-substitution mutator (the only technique delta), which swaps whole CMP operands toward the nearest matching literal (the GSUB/GPOS magic and the DFLT/latn anchor arms), over-committing the corpus to the earlier high-frequency literal case arms and starving exploration of the line-300 USE case; thus the gradient-only fuzzer wins. The winner-enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not the comparison-substitution mutator.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch is the case arm for HB_SCRIPT_PHAGS_PA inside the script-dispatch switch.
The enclosing function switches on the parsed script property of the font.
The winner-resolving overlay marks line 300 and the downstream USE block as hit by W only.
The winning USE-routing tail returns the USE shaper and is hit only by W.
Loser-blocking seeds only reach earlier case arms (Telugu/Indic block) and not line 300.
The winner resolved this branch 10/10 with avg 34 hits while the loser blocked 9/10 with 0 hits.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=34  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner seeds contain structured table-like byte runs and embedded tag-like ascii ('darf', 'h-hans').
evidence_trail.cited_locator: W seed 1 offset 0x10 / W seed 3 offset 0x30

evidence_trail.claim: Loser seeds are dominated by the literal table-magic tokens GSUB/GPOS.
evidence_trail.cited_locator: L seed 2 offset 0x0c / L seed 4 offset 0x0c

evidence_trail.claim: At offset 0x0c the loser is uniformly the byte 0x47 ('G', start of GSUB/GPOS) while the winner is not.
value_profile uses the CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient as its comparison-solving feedback.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: The winner value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; the loser value_profile_cmplog adds it, so I2S is the single technique delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Lineage check is mandatory only when the winning mechanism is I2SRandReplace. Here the winner is value_profile (CMP_MAP gradient, no I2S mutator) and the loser is value_profile_cmplog (adds I2S); this is an I2S-anti branch where adding I2S regresses coverage, so the winner-enabling technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not I2SRandReplace. No lineage query is required for a CMP_MAP-gradient attribution; I2S contribution would only appear in the LOSER lineage, not the winner's.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose script-dispatch switch routes a USE-block script via a CMP that value_profile_cmplog (with I2S) resolves as fast or faster than value_profile, showing I2S does not regress reaching the line-300 arm.

weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2S over-commits the loser to the GSUB/GPOS and DFLT/latn literal arms is inferred from byte concentration and overlay, not from a loser lineage trace confirming I2S substitutions toward those literals.
